definition:
1. initiation  in the mysteries, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; ἐς χεῖρας ἄγεσθαι τὴν τελετήν to take in hand the matter of initiation , (Herdotus Historicus):—;in plural mystic rites at initiation , (Euripides), etc. 
2. a festival accompanied by such rites , in plural, (Pindar); in singular, (Euripides) (ML)
